terminology.Discussion: GitHub Discussions thread collected as RawItem item_type=discussion
terminology.Approach A: inclusion by createdAt within lookback_days, same as issues; not hotness-based
terminology.200-with-errors model: GraphQL 200 can carry errors array; null discussions+errors=disabled/not-found=skip repo; other errors=raise
terminology.json_body switch: _request_with_retry(*, json_body=None)→GET (REST unchanged), dict→POST (GraphQL only); one shared retry/classify path (ADR-002)
terminology.Shape-first classification: detect disabled Discussions by null connection shape (not errors[].type string); null-check precedes errors-raise (ADR-003)
